## Analyzers (1)

### [Cyberprotect_ThreatScore v3.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/Cyberprotect/Cyberprotect_ThreatScore.json)
ThreatScore is a cyber threat scoring system provided by Cyberprotect

- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `domain`, `hash`, `ip`, `url`, `user-agent`
